meta.name: 宝宝饱饱治愈系移动端
meta.description: 从参考图提取并去除角色形象后的设计基线：暖黄与柔粉的低饱和配色、奶油白留白、大圆角卡片、轻量动效和低压力交互。

color.palette_type: analogous warm palette with restrained cool semantic accents

primary.role: 主按钮、当前进度、选中态和关键行动

secondary.role: 情绪背景、引导区和次级高亮

accent.role: 小面积强调、录音状态和重要但非危险的提醒

neutral.usage: 奶油白承载大面积背景，深棕灰承载正文，浅暖灰用于描边、分隔和禁用态

color.contrast_strategy: dark warm text on light cream surfaces; saturated colors are reserved for actions and never used as long-form text backgrounds

font_families.heading: PingFang SC, Noto Sans SC, system-ui, sans-serif
font_families.body: PingFang SC, Noto Sans SC, system-ui, sans-serif

typography.font_style_notes: 使用圆润但克制的系统无衬线字体；标题通过字重而非花体建立亲和力，避免卡通字体损害信息可信度

spacing.content_density: compact but calm; one focal task per screen
spacing.section_rhythm: 普通页主要区块间 16 至 20；菜谱结果页卡内 8 至 12、区块间 10 至 14

layout.alignment_tendency: 正文左对齐，空状态和单一引导居中，底部主行动固定

shape.border_usage: 1px 暖灰细描边用于卡片、输入框和未选中控件；主按钮通常无描边
shape.divider_style: 优先使用留白分组；必要时使用 #F1E9DD 的 1px 分隔线

elevation.shadow_style: almost flat; low-opacity warm shadow only for the current primary task
elevation.depth_cues: 主要依赖表面色差、圆角和留白；普通卡片无阴影，阴影只用于浮层和当前主任务

iconography.preferred_set: Lucide React with a small project-specific SVG set

motion.entrance_pattern: 8px upward fade or gentle scale from 0.98 to 1
motion.exit_pattern: short opacity fade without large displacement
motion.philosophy: 动效用于确认、连接状态和降低焦虑，不用于持续吸引注意；完整支持 reduced motion

components.button_style: 46px 高的大圆角主按钮，暖黄实底深色文字；一屏最多一个主按钮
components.input_style: 43 至 46px 高、12 至 14px 圆角、浅色表面、柔和聚焦描边
components.card_style: 14 至 22px 圆角的奶油白卡片；普通卡片不使用阴影，每张卡最多保留标题和一行状态
components.navigation_pattern: 底部四项以内原生 Tab；步骤流程使用顶部进度和固定底部主行动
components.modal_style: 底部抽屉优先，白色表面、28px 顶部圆角、柔和遮罩；高风险确认使用居中对话框
components.list_style: 菜谱结果使用单卡连续列表，行高 38 至 48px，轻分隔线和点线对齐数量；其他任务列表保持 12 至 16px 间距
components.component_notes: 不用角色形象；通过色块、状态胶囊、图标和微动效表达治愈感。首页只设一个高视觉重量的暖白主任务卡，两个次入口统一使用更紧凑的横向卡片，禁止三个入口同权。长菜谱页优先保障扫读效率，不以大留白制造氛围。固定操作区采用两个并列工具行动加一个全宽主行动；分享卡片延续暖黄页眉、柔粉结论块和奶油白信息面。用餐反馈使用单页分组选择卡，暖黄表示已选，风险项仅在选中时切换为语义红

aesthetic.mood: 温暖、安定、被照顾、低压力
aesthetic.visual_metaphor: 柔软食物、晨光和被轻轻托住的卡片
aesthetic.era_influence: contemporary soft mobile illustration systems without the character layer

visual_language.ornamentation: restrained abstract blobs, dots and soft color fields only
visual_language.whitespace_usage: generous; empty space is used to lower cognitive load
visual_language.visual_weight_distribution: the current decision or task owns most visual weight; secondary information is grouped into quiet cards
visual_language.focal_strategy: one dominant action or conclusion per screen
visual_language.contrast_level: soft chromatic contrast with strong text readability
visual_language.texture_usage: flat matte surfaces; no grain required in v1

composition.hierarchy_method: scale, spacing, surface blocks and semantic color
composition.balance_type: mostly centered for onboarding and asymmetric left-aligned for task screens
composition.grouping_strategy: rounded cards with one purpose each
composition.negative_space_role: creates calm and separates decisions without extra borders

imagery.photo_treatment: warm natural food photography with moderate saturation and no heavy filter
imagery.illustration_style: no character or mascot in the current phase; only simple line icons and abstract food-like geometry
imagery.graphic_elements: soft circles, rounded organic color fields, small sparkles used sparingly
imagery.image_shape: large 20 to 28px rounded rectangles or edge-to-edge hero with rounded lower corners

interaction_feel.feedback_style: gentle scale, color fill and light haptic confirmation
interaction_feel.hover_behavior: not primary on mobile; web fallback uses subtle surface darkening
interaction_feel.loading_style: real stage labels with a softly moving progress highlight; never fake precise percentages

brand_voice_in_ui.tone: 像一位耐心、可靠的陪做伙伴，直接说明下一步和原因
brand_voice_in_ui.cta_style: verb-first and outcome-specific, such as 按宝宝版本开始做
brand_voice_in_ui.empty_state_approach: 用一句清楚说明加一个可执行入口，不依赖角色插画
brand_voice_in_ui.error_tone: 不责备、不卖萌；说明发生了什么、影响是什么、现在可以怎么做

overview.fallback_strategy: 所有效果都可退化为静态色块和 opacity 变化，并尊重系统 reduced motion
overview.primary_technology: CSS transitions, Motion for React and inline SVG

background_effects.description: 在 onboarding 和空状态使用一至两个低饱和暖黄或柔粉色块，不持续运动

particle_systems.description: 当前阶段不使用粒子，避免干扰厨房任务和增加实现成本

scroll_triggered_animations.animation_type: large title fades while compact topbar title appears
scroll_triggered_animations.scrub_behavior: directly linked to scroll progress and clamped between 0 and 1

scroll_morphing.description: 仅在带大标题的列表和详情页联动标题层级；正文卡片尺寸和位置保持稳定

text_effects.description: 仅对状态变化和步骤切换做轻量淡入
text_effects.technology: CSS transitions or Motion for React

cursor_effects.description: 移动端不使用自定义光标

image_effects.description: 食物图片加载完成后淡入，失败时显示中性占位卡
image_effects.technology: native img loading and CSS or Motion for React

canvas_drawings.description: 当前阶段不使用 Canvas 绘制

svg_animations.description: 仅用于进度环、计时和完成勾选的轻量路径动画

params.animation_method: strokeDashoffset driven by Motion for React or CSS

visual_effects.composite_notes: 参考图中的角色插画、冥想星球意象和品牌化形象全部排除；保留暖色、留白、卡片节奏和柔和反馈。禁止引入 WebGL、粒子或持续背景动画，以保证厨房场景中的注意力和低端设备性能。
